description_long: This is a classic black and white police car with a retro design, featuring a rounded roof and prominent fenders. The vehicle has a white roof and doors, contrasted by a black hood, trunk, and lower body panels. On both front doors, there is a large police shield insignia, and the car is equipped with a red dome emergency light on the roof. The side mirrors and additional equipment mounted on the fenders and roof give it a distinctive, almost futuristic appearance. Chrome details are visible on the bumpers, hubcaps, and grille, while the rear features red tail lights and a visible license plate.
description: A retro black and white police car with a red roof light, police insignia on the doors, and chrome detailing. It features unique mounted equipment and a classic, robust design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black hood, chrome grille, headlights, and the red dome light on the white roof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the police shield insignia, side-mounted equipment, and the car's two-tone color scheme.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the black trunk, red tail lights, and the license plate, with roof and fender equipment visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with police insignia, mounted equipment, and the classic wheel design.
attribute_police_markings: Both front doors display a large police shield insignia with the word 'POLICE' and a badge design in blue and white. No other visible text, numbers, or stripes are present.
attribute_emergency_lights: A single red dome emergency light is mounted centrally on the roof. No other emergency lights are visible on the grille or rear.
attribute_police_insignia: A blue and white police shield insignia is present on both front doors, featuring the word 'POLICE' and a badge design.
attribute_license_plate: A white license plate is visible at the rear, with black text. The specific text is not clearly readable in the images.
